m2614.description: Enrich SIEM alert events with m2614.* asset compliance context from the canonical asset index

description: Enriches incoming security alert and log events with M-26-14 asset compliance context. Looks up the source host.name in m2614-assets and attaches asset.type, asset.criticality, m2614.element1_covered, m2614.element2_covered, and compliance fields. Enables Security UI and Entity Store records to surface compliance posture alongside risk scores.

enrich.description: Look up asset compliance context by hostname

script.description: Promote key asset context fields to top level for Entity Store compatibility
